pi_items.source: Wikipedia, Britannica, and geographic databases confirm Charikar is the capital of Parwan Province in Afghanistan. Located at coordinates approximately 34.5°N, 69.2°E.
Verified that 'Charikar' is the correct English spelling of the Afghan city. Constraint in task description confirms this text should not be typed into search field.
Wikipedia and Britannica confirm Kabul is the capital and largest city of Afghanistan. Located at coordinates approximately 34.5°N, 69.2°E.

Distance calculator websites (entfernungsrechner.net, distancefromto.net) confirm the air line distance is approximately 54 km and driving distance is approximately 62 km. Geographic orientation confirms Charikar is north of Kabul.

privileged_info_summary: Charikar is a real city in Afghanistan, serving as the capital of Parwan Province. Kabul is Afghanistan's capital. Charikar is located approximately 54-62 kilometers north of Kabul, making the task's 'approx 60km north' distance estimate accurate. The task uses real geographic data from Afghanistan with authentic city names and relative positions. Data is not synthetic.
